{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

### The Probability Density Function (PDF)  {.smaller}

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec-pdf.qmd >}}

### The Cumulative Distribution Function (CDF)

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec-CDF.qmd >}}

### The Survival Function

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec-survf.qmd >}}

### The Hazard Function

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec-haz.qmd >}}

### The Cumulative Hazard Function

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec-cuhaz.qmd >}}

### Some Key Mathematical Relationships among Survival Concepts

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec-surv-relationships.qmd >}}

### Likelihood with censoring

{{< include _subfiles/sec/_sec-likelihood-with-censoring.qmd >}}
